    A

    AddCustomer() - Static method in class CustomerRelationshipManagement.CRMSystem
    Method for adding Customers into the System
    addTransaction(Transaction) - Static method in class Finance.FinanceSystem
    Adds a transaction directly to the list without user input.

    C

    calculateArea(T, T, T) - Static method in class SupplyChain.SupplyChain
     
    calculatePay() - Method in class HumanResources.Contractor
    Returns the contractor's base hourly rate.
    calculatePay() - Method in class HumanResources.Employee
    Calculates and returns the employee's estimated monthly pay.
    calculatePay() - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Calculates the estimated monthly pay for this employee.
    calculatePay() - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Calculates the estimated monthly pay for this employee.
    calculatePay(int) - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Calculates the estimated gross pay for a given number of months.
    Common - package Common
     
    Contractor - Class in HumanResources
    Represents a contractor employed on a fixed-term basis in the HR system.
    Contractor(String, String, String, double, LocalDate) - Constructor for class HumanResources.Contractor
    Constructs a new Contractor with all required engagement details.
    CRMSystem - Class in CustomerRelationshipManagement
    CRM System class holds the methods for the Customer Relationship Management System
    CRMSystem() - Constructor for class CustomerRelationshipManagement.CRMSystem
     
    Customer - Class in CustomerRelationshipManagement
    This is the customer class that holds all information about the customer And it implements the DetailsDisplayable interface from the common package that has the DetailsDisplayable interface
    Customer(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class CustomerRelationshipManagement.Customer
    Overloaded constructor that defaults TypeOfCustomer to Unspecified
    Customer(String, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class CustomerRelationshipManagement.Customer
    Customer Constructor that holds parameters
    CustomerPayment - Class in Finance
    Represents an inbound payment received from a customer.
    CustomerPayment(String, double, LocalDate, String) - Constructor for class Finance.CustomerPayment
     
    CustomerRelationshipManagement - package CustomerRelationshipManagement
     

    D

    DetailsDisplayable - Interface in Common
    Defines a contract for objects that can display their own details.
    displayInfo() - Method in interface Common.DetailsDisplayable
    Displays a human-readable summary of this object's details to standard output.
    displayInfo() - Method in class CustomerRelationshipManagement.Customer
    Displays the Customers Info
    displayInfo() - Method in class HumanResources.Contractor
    Displays all contractor details including hourly rate and contract end date to standard output.
    displayInfo() - Method in class HumanResources.Employee
    Displays detailed information about this employee to standard output.
    displayInfo() - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Displays full employee details, including annual salary, to standard output.
    displayInfo() - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Displays all employee details including hourly rate, max weekly hours, and PTO to standard output.
    displayInfo(boolean) - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Displays employee details, optionally including the annual salary.
    displayMainMenu() - Static method in class HumanResources.HRSystem
    Prints the main menu options to standard output.

    E

    Employee - Class in HumanResources
    Abstract base class representing a generic employee in the HR system.
    Employee(String, String, String) - Constructor for class HumanResources.Employee
    Constructs a new Employee with the specified identity information.

    Searches the employee roster for the employee with the given ID.
    FullTimeEmployee - Class in HumanResources
    Represents a full-time, salaried employee in the HR system.
    FullTimeEmployee(String, String, String, double, int, boolean) - Constructor for class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Constructs a new FullTimeEmployee with all required employment details.

    Represents a payroll transaction for an employee.

    Prints the main ERP module selection menu to the console.
    processTransaction() - Method in class Finance.CustomerPayment
    Prints a confirmation of the amount received, customer ID, and date.
    processTransaction() - Method in class Finance.Invoice
    Checks payment status and prints whether invoice is paid, overdue, or pending.
    processTransaction() - Method in class Finance.Payroll
    Prints a pay breakdown including gross pay, tax deduction, and net pay.

    Processes this transaction.
